name: multi-company-portal
description: Multi-company login portal that hosts the FinTrack financial app per tenant, with master/staff accounts.
whatsNew: Bank Accounts: "Block" is now called "Freeze", and a frozen bank card gets a subtle icy tint so it stands out.
Bank Accounts: new search box — find a bank by holder name, bank name, account number or PayID.
Mistake entry: new "Deposit Extra" tick-box — adds the amount to Total deposits and logs it as a Mistake at the same time.
